title: Share Feedback
body: We’re working to create a suite of data discovery and analysis tools and would love to get feedback from researchers who have interest in large-scale systems biology, biomedical, and omics research studies to be sure we’re on the right track. If you're interested providing your feedback, please sign up through our Sybio FAIRplex Feedback User Interest Form. Participation looks like reviewing a recorded demo of our tools and answering a brief online survey or completing a brief 1:1 feedback interview with our team. Thank you!
